name: MONSTER STOMPER
description: Dive into an action packed arcade platformer fueled by intense music. Test your reflexes as you jump across floating platforms and use the heavy stomp mechanic to slam down with precision. Master the slow motion feature to calculate your drops and survive the chaos. With 10 distinct levels to conquer, it is all about speed, timing, and pure momentum. Keep your focus sharp and stomp your way to the top.
instructions: Your objective is to achieve the highest score possible by jumping between platforms and using your stomp ability to land with precision There is no finish line Instead you must complete specific missions to unlock new stages and keep pushing for a hig
